message:
test: add RecentlyViewedSidebar and FeaturedPromptsSection tests

16 new tests covering history sidebar (loading/empty states, prompt
entries from registry, search entries, clear history with success/error
toasts, disabled clear button) and featured prompts section (heading,
curated subtitle, view all count, card rendering, null on empty, 6
prompt limit).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
